Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Ctors | Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public class

FastXmlSerializer

extends Object
implements XmlSerializer
java.lang.Object
   ↳ com.android.internal.util.FastXmlSerializer

Class Overview

This is a quick and dirty implementation of XmlSerializer that isn't horribly painfully slow like the normal one. It only does what is needed for the specific XML files being written with it.

Summary

Public Constructors
FastXmlSerializer()
FastXmlSerializer(int bufferSize)
Allocate a FastXmlSerializer with the given internal output buffer size.

Public Constructors

public FastXmlSerializer ()

public FastXmlSerializer (int bufferSize)

Allocate a FastXmlSerializer with the given internal output buffer size. If the size is zero or negative, then the default buffer size will be used.

Parameters
bufferSize int: Size in bytes of the in-memory output buffer that the writer will use.
